{"type":"result","subtype":"success","is_error":false,"api_error_status":null,"duration_ms":818149,"duration_api_ms":675095,"num_turns":81,"result":"Phase 6 완료. 변경 사항 요약:

### 새 파일 (3건)
- **`src/app/api/worker/drawing-revisions/route.ts`** — Worker 도면 이력 조회(GET) + 도면 등록(POST), erp-session 쿠키 인증 → NestJS 프록시
- **`src/app/api/worker/drawing-revisions/upload-urls/route.ts`** — Worker 도면 업로드 presigned URL 발급(POST)
- **`src/app/worker/_components/WorkerDrawingUpload.tsx`** — 모바일 최적화 도면 업로드 컴포넌트 (카메라/파일 선택, 사유 select, R2 업로드 → DrawingRevision 생성)

### 수정 파일 (3건)
- **`src/app/worker/_lib/hooks.ts`** — `useWorkerDrawingRevisions` 훅 추가 (Worker 전용 erp-session 인증 경로)
- **`src/app/worker/_components/OfficeContactCard.tsx`** — 도면 업로드 버튼 (drawing/sample 단계만) + 도면 이력 토글
- **`src/app/worker/_components/StaffContactCard.tsx`** — 도면 업로드 버튼 (drawing_confirmed 단계만) + 도면 이력 토글

### AC 검증
- `tsc --noEmit` — 통과
- `pnpm build` — 성공
- `pnpm test` — 기존 R2 테스트 2건 외 전부 통과 (변경 전후 동일)","stop_reason":"end_turn","session_id":"8fed5be1-9a56-4441-8e39-a43ac312cd56","total_cost_usd":5.53111825,"usage":{"input_tokens":479,"cache_creation_input_tokens":252689,"cache_read_input_tokens":5820134,"output_tokens":41574,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":252689,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[{"input_tokens":10,"output_tokens":490,"cache_read_input_tokens":156985,"cache_creation_input_tokens":1039,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":1039},"type":"message"}],"speed":"standard"},"modelUsage":{"claude-opus-4-6[1m]":{"inputTokens":479,"outputTokens":41574,"cacheReadInputTokens":5820134,"cacheCreationInputTokens":252689,"webSearchRequests":0,"costUSD":5.53111825,"contextWindow":1000000,"maxOutputTokens":64000}},"permission_denials":[],"terminal_reason":"completed","fast_mode_state":"off","uuid":"aa030af1-a413-4c51-a35d-5f77d7bcc5aa"}
